query:
-- Recent pipeline runs
SELECT 
  id,
  DATE(startedAt) as run_date,
  status,
  LEFT(summary, 200) as summary_preview
FROM pipelineRuns
WHERE startedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
ORDER BY startedAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
